channel.title: Pattaya Gym Directory - Watersports / Diving venues
channel.description: Latest watersports / diving venues in the Pattaya Gym Directory.

item.title: KBA Kiteboarding Asia Pattaya (Blue Lagoon)
item.description: Kiteboarding shop and school. International chain with Pattaya branch.

item.title: Royal Varuna Yacht Club
item.description: Thailand most prestigious yacht club, founded 60+ years ago. RYA-accredited sailing + powerboating training. World-class regattas (ILCA, OK Dinghy, Optimist, Dart, Hobie, Multihull). Pratamnak Hill clubhouse + pool + boat storage + beach bar.

item.title: Ocean Marina Jomtien — Southeast Asia's Largest Marina
item.description: Southeast Asia largest marina. 455 wet berths + 100 trailer + 30 hardstand. Yachts up to 75m. Award-winning. Top of the Gulf Regatta host. SailBreeze sailing school on-site. Yacht charter + brokerage hub. Customs clearance for international yachts.

item.title: Koh Larn (Coral Island) — Pattaya Day-Trip Beach Island
item.description: Pattaya primary day-trip beach island. 30-min ferry from Bali Hai Pier. 6 beaches (Tawaen, Samae, Tien, Nual, Ta Yai, La). Parasailing, banana boats, jet ski, snorkeling, intro scuba, beach volleyball. Genuinely clearer water + whiter sand than mainland.

item.title: Mermaid's Dive Center
item.description: PADI 5-Star IDC dive center. Day trips, courses beginner to instructor, technical diving.

item.title: Pattaya Dive Centre
item.description: Pattaya's only Beach Road PADI Dive Centre. 24+ years established. All PADI courses + Tec.

item.title: Seafari PADI Dive Centre
item.description: British-owned PADI 5-Star IDC. 40+ years of diving experience in Thailand.

item.title: Pattaya Scuba Adventures
item.description: PADI dive center offering courses and guided diving trips around Pattaya.

item.title: No Limit Divers Pattaya
item.description: PADI 5-Star IDC with PADI Internship Programs. Pattaya-based dive center.

item.title: Jomtien Dive Center
item.description: PADI 5-Star IDC. Highly rated by both customers and IDC candidates.

item.title: Clubloongchat Watersports
item.description: Beachside watersports school: kitesurfing, wingfoiling, windsurfing, sailing, SUP. Expert lessons + rentals.

item.title: Kitesurf Pattaya
item.description: IKO-certified kitesurfing courses. Beginner package starts at $250 for 3 days.

item.title: Wave Pattaya Watersports
item.description: Multi-sport watersports operator. Various Pattaya beach activities.

item.title: Thai Wake Park Pattaya
item.description: Pattaya only cable wakeboarding park. Two lakes (beginner + advanced). All equipment included.

item.title: SailBreeze Sailing School @ Ocean Marina
item.description: Thailand most experienced sailing school (20+ years). Based at Ocean Marina Jomtien — Southeast Asia largest marina (450+ berths). IYT certification + yacht charters.

item.title: Adventure Divers Pattaya
item.description: Established 1998. 27+ years operating. Own dive boat MV Saifon. Full PADI pipeline. HTMS Khram wreck specialist. English/Russian/Thai instruction.

item.title: Aquanauts Dive Center Pattaya
item.description: Pattaya only British/Dutch-owned PADI 5-Star CDC + National Geographic Dive Center. 13+ years. Full tech instructor pipeline. Conservation focus.

item.title: Real Divers Pattaya
item.description: Pattaya only British family-run PADI 5-Star IDC. Chandler brothers since 2005. 12m speedboat. Pattaya near islands + Samae San specialty.

item.title: Dive Station Pattaya
item.description: SSI-certified dive operation. First-timer + certified + snorkeling on same boat. Continental European visitor friendly.

item.title: Underwater World Pattaya
item.description: Pattaya only aquarium. First modern aquarium in Thailand (2003). 105m+ underwater tunnel. 5,000+ marine animals. 4 zones. Dive-with-sharks program for certified divers. Biggest jellyfish collection in Thailand.
